headline: Oklo Links Nuclear Reactors To AI Growth With NVIDIA And LANL Partnership
summary: Oklo (NYSE:OKLO) has entered into a partnership with NVIDIA and Los Alamos National Laboratory to support nuclear powered AI infrastructure and plutonium fuel research. The collaboration aims to combine Oklo's advanced reactor work with NVIDIA's AI systems and LANL's nuclear research capabilities to support energy hungry data centers and nuclear R&D. The news highlights Oklo's effort to link its reactor projects to the growing demand from AI and advanced computing sectors. For investors...
